headline: Can 3M (MMM) Still Trade At A Discount After PFAS Lawsuit?
summary: 3M stock has more than doubled over the past three years, while current checks suggest the shares trade below an intrinsic value estimate based on a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) approach and also screen as undervalued on traditional earnings multiples. At the same time, a mixed broader valuation score and fresh legal action over PFAS chemicals mean the gap between price and estimated value is not a straightforward story. 3M has delivered a 103.6% return over the last three years, which puts...
